about_text:
Software engineering student nearing graduation, skilled in UI/UX design and front-end development. Passionate about creating intuitive, user-centered interfaces that combine functionality and aesthetics.

Seeking internship opportunities to apply technical knowledge, grow professionally, and contribute to innovative projects. I am proactive, adaptable, and eager to learn.
skills_dev_text: Frameworks and languages focused on web, mobile and multiplatform development.
skills_soft_text: Interpersonal skills and aptitudes that define me.
experience1_text1: Training in front-end development tools, including React and Bootstrap 5.0, as well as basic version control with GitHub.
experience1_text2: Design and proposal of improvements for institutional modules using Figma, with a focus on usability and visual consistency.
experience1_text3: Contribution to improving the user experience through the creation of intuitive design alternatives.
experience2_text1: Volunteer responsible for managing social media and creating digital content, designing strategies to increase the project's reach, and encouraging the interest of young women (14-18 years) in programming and technology.
experience3_text1: Design and development of responsive interfaces for a health web platform focused on streamlining the workflows of resident physicians in public hospitals.
experience3_text2: I work on implementing user-centered solutions, seeking to improve usability and reduce processes complexity.
education_period: Period: Aug.2022 - Expected to graduate in 2026
education_institution: Institution: School of Telematics, University of Colima.
education_description: Description: Degree in software engineering, with a focus on front-end development and UI/UX design.
